metadata.disclaimer: Scores are indicative and opinion biased based on Jentic's view of what is important to deliver APIs which higher levels of interpretability for AI systems.

dimensions.name: Foundational Compliance
dimensions.intention: Base layer of spec validity and structural soundness.

dimensions.name: Developer Experience & Jentic Compatibility
dimensions.intention: Clarity, completeness, and ingestion readiness for developers and tooling.

dimensions.name: AI-Readiness & Agent Experience
dimensions.intention: Semantic breadth, depth, and agent comprehension for AI systems.

dimensions.name: Agent Usability
dimensions.intention: Functional utility, complexity comfort, and AI orchestration readiness.

dimensions.name: Security
dimensions.intention: Trust, risk posture, and security compliance.

dimensions.name: AI Discoverability
dimensions.intention: Findability, semantic richness, and reasoning readiness.

details.name: Foundational & DX
details.description: Human-oriented and tooling alignment - standards compliance, linting, and developer usability.

dimensions.name: Foundational Compliance
dimensions.intention: Base layer of spec validity and structural soundness.

signals.name: Lint Results
signals.description: Aggregated quality score from linter diagnostics, weighted by severity.

signals.name: Resolution Completeness
signals.description: Percentage of `$ref` references that resolve successfully.

signals.name: Specification Validity
signals.description: Checks whether the API description parses successfully and conforms to its declared specification (e.g., OpenAPI).

signals.name: Structural Integrity
signals.description: Structural correctness score based on schema issues using logarithmic dampening.

dimensions.name: Developer Experience & Jentic Compatibility
dimensions.intention: Clarity, completeness, and ingestion readiness for developers and tooling.

signals.name: Example Density
signals.description: How richly the API is illustrated with examples.

signals.name: Example Validity
signals.description: Percentage of examples that conform to their schemas.

signals.name: Response Coverage
signals.description: Percentage of operations with complete response definitions (success, client error, server error).

signals.name: Tooling Readiness
signals.description: Health of API ingestion, bundling, and resolution within Jentic pipelines.

details.name: AI-Readiness & Usability
details.description: Machine-oriented semantic clarity - interpretability, structure, and AI agent comprehension.

dimensions.name: AI-Readiness & Agent Experience
dimensions.intention: Semantic breadth, depth, and agent comprehension for AI systems.

signals.name: Description Coverage
signals.description: Coverage of descriptions across API elements.

signals.name: Error Standardization
signals.description: Coverage of RFC 9457 Problem Details for error responses.

signals.name: OperationId Quality
signals.description: Coverage, uniqueness, and casing consistency of operationIds for AI inference.

dimensions.name: Agent Usability
dimensions.intention: Functional utility, complexity comfort, and AI orchestration readiness.

signals.name: Complexity Comfort
signals.description: Agent comfort level based on API operational and structural complexity.

details.name: Trust/Safety & Discoverability
details.description: Ecosystem-oriented governance - security, findability, and safe AI agent interaction.

dimensions.name: Security
dimensions.intention: Trust, risk posture, and security compliance.

signals.name: Authentication Strength
signals.description: Average quality of security schemes based on authentication method strength (weakest link for OAuth2).

dimensions.name: AI Discoverability
dimensions.intention: Findability, semantic richness, and reasoning readiness.

signals.name: Descriptive Richness
signals.description: Clarity and depth of descriptions across API elements.
